attributes.action: Protected Rights for indigenous Welsh, Scots, English & Northern Irish peoples.
attributes.additional_details:
1 Introduce an immediate & comprehensive halt to all  non-low skilled immigration accepting only the brightest and the best. 

2 Withdraw from the ECHR on migration & asylum issues 

3 Accelerate the removal of illegal entrants, failed asylum seekers, foreign national offenders & individuals who threaten public order or national security

4 Reduce migration incentives by limiting access to welfare benefits, social housing, & other public services for non-citizens and recent arrivals
attributes.background:
Driven by our love & responsibility for our nation, descendants, & our shared heritage,  
call upon the Government & Parliament to recognise & protect the inalienable right of the English, Scots, Northern Irish & Welsh peoples to preserve their collective identity, heritage, culture & way of life

rejection.details:
We are not clear what you mean by "the inalienable right of the English, Scots, Northern Irish & Welsh peoples to preserve their collective identity, heritage, culture & way of life" insofar as it might not already be recognised and protected.

We already have quite a few petitions open on matters relating to immigration and  to the EHRC. You may wish to use the search function on the e-petitions site to find petitions which are already open and with which you agree - which you may then wish to sign.
